emails.subject: Austin Sandhill Mgt Committee
emails.body: Austin Sandhill Mgt Committee To transition Enron's Sandhill Management Committee members from Jim/Billy to Kevin/Dave I have drafted and legal has reviewed a notification letter (attached below) that Jim Ducote is going to hand deliver to Andy Ramirez (Austin's Mgt Committee member) at a meeting he has with him on Monday 5/21 to insure a smooth transition. The management committee meetings are held whenever necessary approximately once per month during construction, but should be less frequent now that the plant is to be operational May 23. Jim has mentioned there will be some issues that need to be cleaned up such as the plant's construction delay (was guaranteed to be complete 5/1) at the next meeting that should take place in June. Also, I think adding capacity to the demineralization plant is a "no-brainer" to enable us to run the plant at full on the weekends. Kevin/Dave if you would like to call Andy Ramirez his number is (512) 322-6479. If anyone has any concerns with this transition please call me asap at x3-4258. Thanks, Mike

emails.subject: RE: Austin Sandhill Mgt Committee
emails.body: RE: Austin Sandhill Mgt Committee Looks fine to me. Pls let me know if there's anything I can do to help going forward. I think that we have a very good relationship in place with these guys. Eric Jeffrey I'm going to be in Austin on Friday, and would like to stop by the plant around 9 am to check it out. I'm playing phone tag with Chris and Andy to check their availability (I know Chris has a staff meeting at that time). Pls let me know if you guys are going to be around then (don't make a special trip). Regards, Billy
